channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 2 matress, 16th July
item.description:
2 msttress

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lettsom Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gridlocked roads, 16th July
item.description:
Our road is being used as a racetrack as cars are speeding down to get through as fast as possible before they get stuck. Had the road gridlocked several times tonight as roads are too small for two way traffic. The road is not being closed to traffic along slades road so cars are just cutting through, someone is going to get hurt or an accident is going to happen.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Windmill Gardens, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging Vegetation, 16th July
item.description:
Bushes Overgrown And Need Trimming Back.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hodson Crescent, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cycle lane outside St Pancras Hospital, 16th July
item.description:
There have been 6 accidents, that I have seen, of people coming off of their bikes in the cycle lane, in the past week, at exactly the same spot. It has been happening since the lane was put in but its been particularly bad the past week or so. There was 4 in one day!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pancras Road, Somers Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This bit of green area has been a dumping rubbish for well over a year., 16th July
item.description:
The whole pavement from woodpecker road to slocum close into Carlyle road is filthy, overgrown weeds,tree branches, dog fouling. It never get cleaned.. I see the cart road sweeper wheezing by without actually collect rubbish on the curbs or pavement. Some Fridays a group of people with new brushes and bins walk by doing nothing, just pretending! EYESORE

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Abbotts Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 0n Road outside 4 Donaldson road, 16th July
item.description:
Beer bottle and coffee cup in road where between cars . Ingage upload not working
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Couple of bags left before 8am turned into a mountain of flytipped waste, including business flytipping, by 8pm, 16th July
item.description:
A daily sight. A couple of bags left before 8am doesn't get collected, so during the day the bags attract more bags and other detritis, so by 8pm it is a mound of flytipped waste. Southwark Council, if you still think installing food waste bins alongside a general bin next to a bus stop was a good idea, at least clear up the dumped rubbish more than once every 24 hours

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camberwell Green, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant fly tipping, 16th July
item.description:
Fly tipping continues to be a major problem on our street. Some by residents and some by various vehciles coming to the area. Our landlord is aware but thus far has done nothing about it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 111, Oakley Drive, New Eltham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Footpath blocked for 3 weeks, 16th July
item.description:
Again area from 23 Capstone Road down to Downham Way full of rubbish. Items bumped on footpath so I moved it off the path. The large 2 ton bag too heavy for me to move. Also no sightings of street cleaners. They should be around and reporting flying tipping and griffa.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Capstone Road, Downham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car dumped nt recognised by dvla, 16th July
item.description:
Car dumped here for about 3 weeks rear window open. Evidence of drug use within it. Seen previously with 2 white mean sitting in it lnhaling gas from cannisters

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 115, Oakley Drive, New Eltham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Cat, 16th July
item.description:
Cat has been found either run over or fallen from height. A cone has been put near it to hopefully be found by owner or collected by council/medivet.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Old Jamaica Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car in HMP Thameside Car park, 16th July
item.description:
Abandoned car in HMP Thameside Prison carpark. The plates are believed to be false and rear plate is hanging off. It has been here for a long time and has multiple parking tickets on windscreen. One of the windows is partially open.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Manor Way, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping - Dumped Mattress, 16th July
item.description:
Someone has dumped a mattress behind the bushes in park area. It appears to have been there for a couple of weeks or more. It is located near the dog poo bin in the park.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rainbow Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Slades rd closed because of water leak, cars are using park way as a cut through, 16th July
item.description:
Thames water has shut slades hill at windmill gardens, now the traffic is cutting though our little road and it’s chaos. Can they put up more road markings to stop this.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Windmill Gardens, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Clothing and shoes in Hay.es St near Hedger St., 16th July
item.description:
Regular grot spot

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 185, Brook Drive, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: An abandoned wheelie bin opposite 41 Linden Grove, 16th July
item.description:
A Lewisham Council green wheelie bin full of rubbish has been left abandoned opposite 41 Linden Grove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Linden Grove, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking fire access and garages, 16th July
item.description:
As normally 4 people cannot get their cars in or out and the emergency access is blocked during this season with loads of fires.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin outside 187 Brook Drive. Food bags have spilled on to the pavement., 16th July
item.description:
There are 4 key boxes at this property. Probably AirbnB. People don’t realize rubbish should be sorted. They don’t recycle food either. Something needs to be done. This area is going downhill.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 185, Brook Drive, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass, 16th July
item.description:
Yet again, there is broken glass all over the cycle path outside the pub
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nunhead Passage, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green patch, 16th July
item.description:
Fly tip rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Englefield Crescent, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
